sglang.title: [model-gateway] Optimize radix tree timestamp updates for multi-tenant scaling
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Replace O(depth) ancestor timestamp propagation with O(1) matched-node-only
updates. The ancestor propagation was unnecessary - eviction only uses leaf
timestamps, so updating ancestors had no effect on LRU behavior.
Changes:

Remove ancestor timestamp propagation entirely
Update only the matched no

sglang.title: [model-gateway] Optimize INSERT with leaf-only timestamp updates
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Apply same O(1) optimization to INSERT that we applied to MATCH. Intermediate node timestamps are never used - eviction only checks leaf timestamps via leaf_of(). Skip redundant O(depth) updates.
Changes:

Root: use or_insert(0) instead of insert(epoch)
Intermediate nodes: only ensure tenant exists,

vllm.title: [ROCm][GPTQ][Bugfix] Fix GPTQ GEMM kernel output zeroing race condition
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Fixes a race condition in the GPTQ GEMM kernels that caused incorrect results when input_size > BLOCK_KN_SIZE (128).
Problem
The GPTQ GEMM kernels use multiple thread blocks along the k-dimension (gridDim.z > 1) that accumulate partial results via atomicAdd. The output tensor was being zeroe

Purpose
This PR adds the continue_final_message parameter to the parameters accepted by the /embeddings endpoint. That feature was requested in #31440 to allow for better control over embeddings generated by chat-based models.
Test Plan
